title: T-010 — API: Item detail and update (GET/PUT /api/technical/items/:item_code)
prompt: Implement GET and PUT for /api/technical/items/[item_code] per §6.2. GET returns item with related counts (active BOMs, allergen profile entries count, last cost effective_from, last D365 sync). PUT accepts partial update; re-validates V-TEC-01..04. Both org-scoped via RLS. Permission gate: technical.items.edit on PUT. Audit log entry on PUT (ADR-008) using audit_log table. RED tests/api/items-detail.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/items-detail.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item detail GET and PUT endpoints with audit and validations.
pipeline_inputs.details: Audit log row inserts before/after JSON of changed fields and userId. Use Drizzle transactions. 404 when item_code not found in current org.
acceptance_criteria: Given item exists in org A, when GET as org A, then 200 with related counts; when GET as org B, then 404 (RLS).
Given PUT updates name, when committed, then audit_log row contains old+new name.
Given PUT to deprecated item where field protected, when run, then 409.
Given invalid weight_mode update breaking V-TEC-02, when PUT runs, then 422.
test_strategy: RED tests: cross-org GET, audit emission on PUT, V-TEC validation on PUT.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow PUT to change item_code (immutable after create).
Do not return private_jsonb unless requester role is owner.
